content.en:
"Hahaha, the Lord of the Cave Void also helped me indirectly this time, if he hadn't led away the bone transformation realm of the Conghai Branch, I really wouldn't have been able to succeed!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

This time, he gained a lot.

I have to say that Yahe Palace is really rich, even if it is a branch, there are a lot of resources.

He quickly hid himself, with his current strength, only the Bone Transformation Realm could hope to track him, but those Bone Transformation Realms were still too slow, after all, he didn't expect someone to rob the Conghai Branch.

Somewhere in the seam of the river boundary.

Ye Tian hidden, and then began to sort out the harvest this time.

"Endless Ancient Gold, eight hundred and sixty-two pieces, and eighteen drops of Endless Golden Pith. There are also a lot of other resources, and there are many resources that are helpful for the cultivation of the Bone Transformation Realm. "

After Ye Tian sorted it out, he put it away.

......

Due to the looting of the Conghai Branch, Ye Tian's Gu Lou Tianzu's copy body was transferred back, because there was no need to guard it.

After that, Gu Lou Tianzu practiced with all his might, as well as comprehended the Taigu Golden Text, coupled with the resources of Yahe Palace, his cultivation improved rapidly, and his strength continued to increase.

However, before this replica body had broken through to the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, Ye Tian's true replica body was rejected from the Yahe Boundary Crack.

"I was ostracized, but fortunately, Gu Lou Tianzu is still in Yahe Palace, and I can continue to come into contact with more Ancient Golden Texts!" Ye Tian muttered.

At this time.

The Lord of the Void was also ostracized.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you also came out alive!"

The Lord of the Cave Void was a little embarrassed at the moment, his mental state was very bad, and he seemed to have experienced a very tragic battle.

After all, he has been hunted down and killed during this time, and there are many Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who are even stronger than him, so it is good that he can survive, so naturally he is not in a good state.

Wow!

The Lord of the Void Cave left, and he didn't know whether to heal or cultivate.

Ye Tian also left and returned to the Dark Sea.

Seeing Ye Tian coming, the Lord of Darkness asked, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you came back from the Yahe Realm and came to me, could it be that you found something good and asked me to help extract it?"

"It's true!"

Ye Tian took out those endless ancient gold.

"Endless Ancient Gold !!!" the Lord of Darkness was shocked, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you really surprised me, Yahe Palace is almost in charge of the Yahe Boundary Rift, and the control of Endless Ancient Gold is very strict, at most it is very good to collect one or two pieces of Endless Ancient Gold, you actually got so much Endless Ancient Gold? Did you loot a certain branch of Yahe Palace?"

"Yes, I did ransack a certain branch of Yahe Palace!" Ye Tian admitted: "It was also good luck that the Lord of the Cave Void invaded other branches and attracted a bone transformation realm from Yahe Palace, and also attracted the bone transformation realm of that branch away, so I took the opportunity to snatch the treasure house of that branch." "

"Your luck ......"

The Lord of Darkness didn't know what to say.

However, he also knew that things were definitely not as simple as Ye Tian said.

First of all, how Ye Tian knew the location of the treasure house, and how he pinched the timing so accurately was Ye Tian's ability!

In other words, if it is the other nine Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level geniuses, where would they dare to invade a branch of Yahe Palace, unless they are looking for death!

"Okay, these Endless Ancient Gold, I'll refine the Endless Golden Marrow for you, and I won't charge you for the Endless Golden Marrow, just give me some resources suitable for the Bone Transformation Realm. "

The Lord of Darkness.

"Thank you, Lord of Darkness!"

Ye Tian took out some resources suitable for the Bone Transformation Realm and handed them over to the Lord of Darkness.

Then, the Lord of Darkness went to refine the Endless Golden Essence.

In the following years, Ye Tian's copied body continued to master more Ancient Golden Scripts with the help of the Ancient Golden Scripts of Yahe Palace, thus creating the Second Supreme Ancient Bone Technique in the future.

Of course, it's hard to create success.

The long years passed.

this day.

The Lord of Darkness informed Ye Tian that he had refined those Endless Golden Piles.

Soon, Ye Tian came and took away these endless golden pith.

"I don't know if these endless golden pith can make one of my immeasurable bones complete bone transformation!"

Ye Tian was ready to give it a try.

I saw him refining these Endless Golden Bone drop by drop, fusing the energy of the Endless Golden Pulp into an immeasurable bone, and constantly refining the immeasurable bone.

Time passed slowly, and this immeasurable bone continued to be tempered and strengthened, and it seemed to be getting closer and closer to bone transformation.

In the end, these endless golden pith were completely digested, but the bone transformation was still not completed.

"Sure enough, the last few immeasurable bones of an ancient-level genius want to be bone transformed, and they need too much endless golden marrow!" Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he was going to create another top-notch primeval bone technique that was very close to the highest level, and fuse it into this immeasurable bone to see if he could make his bones change, but it would take luck, if not, he would have to wait to create a top-level primeval bone technique.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian had finally succeeded in creating a top-notch primeval bone technique, which was relatively close to the supreme primordial bone technique, but the gap was definitely incomparably huge.

"Try it, after all, this immeasurable bone has been tempered to this extent by the Endless Golden Marrow, maybe it can really complete the bone transformation!"

At any moment, he began to integrate this top-notch primeval bone technique into this immeasurable bone.

Rumble!!!!!

The bone transformation has begun!

"Good luck!"

Ye Tian was excited.

After a while, the bone transformation was completed, his physical strength increased again, and his strength increased by a cut.

"Now there are only three immeasurable bones left, and there is no bone change!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

A crack in the river boundary, the entrance of a crack appears.

As soon as possible, Yahe Palace blocked the entrance to this crack.

They all knew very well that this was supposed to be the entrance to the rift in the territorial waters.

Yahe Palace.

A group of bone metamorphosis realms are deliberating.

The deputy palace master of Yahe Palace, the lord of Huang Ze, is an ancient-level genius of the three bone transformation realms.

The deputy palace master of Yahe Palace, the master of the true pupil, is a boundary-breaking genius of the four bone transformation realms.

As well as the Great Elder, the ordinary five-stage bone transformation realm peak existence.

These three presided over the meeting, and as for the palace master of Yahe Palace, they have been impacting a higher level, so they will not appear for the time being.

The Lord of Huang Ze suggested: "The passage leading from the Yahe Boundary Rift to the territorial sea Boundary Rift has appeared, and I suggest that you enter the territorial sea Boundary Rift. This time, the Lord of the Void in the Territorial Sea Boundary Gap went too far, he actually robbed us of a lot of resources, and even killed a Bone Transformation Realm Elder, if we don't retaliate, wouldn't we admit it?"

"The boundary gap of the territorial sea is being upgraded, even if we can exert most of our strength, and we will not be suppressed by a realm like in the primeval era. Therefore, if we all go over, it is enough to cause damage to the boundary gap of the territorial waters, and it is also a good choice to kill a few more bone transformation realms and rob them of their resources!"
